description_long: This is a modern suburban house with a flat roof and a rectangular footprint, featuring a two-car driveway at the front with one red and one white car parked. The facade is clad in light-colored brick or stone, with large rectangular windows arranged in a symmetrical pattern. The rear of the house opens onto a spacious backyard with a grassy lawn, a row of trees or shrubs along one side, and a patio area that includes a hot tub. The side yards are enclosed by low white fencing, and the landscaping is minimal but well-maintained. The house appears to be a single-story structure with a clean, contemporary design and an emphasis on open outdoor space.
description: A modern, single-story suburban house with a flat roof, brick facade, large windows, and a spacious backyard with a patio and hot tub.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, two-car driveway with red and white cars, and symmetrical windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, the white car, and the backyard with a row of trees and green lawn.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, large tree, patio area, and hot tub adjacent to the house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the red car, side yard, and the backyard with trees and a pool or hot tub.
attribute_entryway_design: Central front door with a small porch, flanked by windows and a paved driveway, minimal decorative elements.
